header.title: Create
header.subtitle: What do you want to create today?

upload.label: Upload File
upload.tagline: Upload an audio file — select type first

music.label: Music / Song
music.note: Unlocks rights and music publishing flow

live.label: Live
live.tagline: Start a live broadcast session — choose live type

short.label: Short / Clip
short.tagline: A short clip for discovery — not a story or a post

sessions.label: On Road / Sessions
sessions.tagline: Start an On Road session — choose world first
sessions.gateNote: On Road / Sessions — requires permission or module activation. Visible in UI foundation mode.

type.label: Session Type
type.note: Open, closed, or on the road

start.label: Start or Schedule
start.note: Start now or schedule for later

music.label: Music
music.tagline: Launch your music — select release type

radio.label: Radio
radio.tagline: Creating a radio requires permission or package
radio.gateNote: Radio locked — requires admin approval or qualifying package

request.label: Request Station Creation
request.note: Submit a request to open your station

contact.label: Request Program / Contact Station
contact.note: Submit a program pitch to an existing station

competition.label: Competition
competition.tagline: Create an audio competition in the tournaments world

ads.label: Ads / Promotion
ads.tagline: Set up your campaign — select targeting worlds later

title.label: Campaign Title & Goal
title.note: What do you want to promote?

targeting.label: Target Worlds (Multi)
targeting.note: Choose more than one world when setting up the campaign

story.label: Story
story.tagline: A story that disappears after 24 hours — not tied to a world

status.label: Status Update
status.tagline: Update your status on your profile — your world is your identity

music.label: Music Status
music.note: A song that expresses your mood

listening.label: What are you listening to
listening.tagline: Share what you're listening to — global social identity

invite.label: Invite to co-listen
invite.note: Share the session with a friend

messages.sessionsRule: Radio and Tournaments are not valid destinations for On Road sessions.
messages.setupStepsAfterWorld: Setup steps after selecting a world
messages.adsNote: Multi-world targeting — you can choose more than one world when setting up the campaign.
messages.comingSoon: Coming soon — activated after publishing verification services
messages.phaseNote: 🔒 All creation options will be enabled gradually after publishing the permissions verification services.
